steps.title: Read the intercept sign
steps.content: The line of best fit crosses the $y$-axis above the origin, so the $y$-intercept is positive.

steps.title: Read the slope sign
steps.content: The line rises from left to right, so the slope is positive.

steps.title: Match both features
steps.content: The only listed equation with a positive intercept and a positive slope is $y=2.8+1.7x$. The answer is A.
